title: Create: Irradiated
description: A mod that adds radioactive materials and themed items to the Create mod.
body:
**Create: Irradiated**


_I highly recommend downloading JEI/REI or this mod might be a little confusing._

**ABOUT:**

Create: Irradiated adds Uranium Chunks, Thorium Chunks and Plutonium Chunks to the Create mod! They drop from Radioactive Ore (70% chance Uranium, 25% chance Thorium, 5% chance Plutonium). These ores can be found in the Toxic Wasteland biome.
The new ores can be crushed and then mixed in a superheated mixer with Chromatic Compound (Heated mixer: Polished Rose Quartz, Glowstone Dust, Powdered Obsidian) and a diamond to make their refined variants.
Refined Uranium can be used to make tools and a medallion that gives Speed I when it is in a player's inventory. It is also used in Hazmat Armor along with Refined Thorium and Refined Plutonium. Uranium tools are much better than Netherite, but not insanely overpowered. Refined Thorium can make a medallion which gives Health Boost I, also used for Hazmat Armor. Refined Plutonium can make a medallion which gives Strength II.
The radioactive chunks can be superheated in a mixer to get 500mB of Molten Uranium/Thorium/Plutonium, which can be spouted into a bucket. Each apple gives better effects than the last, but they all give Regeneration, Health Boost and more. When these liquids are placed in the world, any entity that steps in them will receive Radiation (Uranium = I, Thorium = II, Plutonium = III) for as long as they stand in it. Useful for traps or mob farms!
Rubber has also been added. Mix in a heated mixer 5 logs and 500mB of water to make 500mB of Molten Sap. 100mB of Molten Sap and a slimeball makes 1 Sap. Sap can then be blasted with bulk blasting or a blast furnace to make Rubber. Rubber is then pressed into sheets and can be used with the other refined materials to make Hazmat Armor. Hazmat Armor is better than Netherite and protects you from the Radiation effect.

The Radiation effect is an effect that you receive when holding Uranium (Radiation I), Thorium (Radiation II) or Plutonium (Radiation III) and is an effect that passively deals 1 damage (half a heart) every second.

 

ADDED IN 1.02: Refined Uranium can be used to make a Nuke, which has the power of 25 TNT. The Nuke can be lit with a flint and steel and takes 15 seconds to explode, giving you enough time to escape, which you better hope you do.

 

REMOVED IN 1.02: With 500mB of the liquids can be spouted onto an apple, making their respective apple types (Uranium Apple, Thorium Apple, Plutonium Apple).

 

I hope you enjoy the mod, as it is my first one and took many struggling hours to make!

If you find any bugs, make a comment and I'll check it out!
